title: sambucus racemosa var. pubescens
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. pubescens, also known as the dwarf or downy elder, is a variety of the Sambucus racemosa plant, which is a deciduous shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiviral, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoids and anthraquinones. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa var. pubescens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and flu. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and syrups, although it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
